name: Home Control
description: Control smart home devices via natural language.

examples: I need to get entity state
I need to call HA service
I need to discover LG TV
I need to list TV apps
I need to list TV inputs
I need to list HC appliances
I need to hC appliance status
I need to start HC program
I need to stop HC program
I need to hue device state
Can you help me activate scene?
Can you help me device functions?

out_of_domain.message: This request is outside my capabilities.

scenarios.title: List rooms
scenarios.description: User triggers "List rooms" (e.g. "List rooms") and the agent handles it end-to-end.
steps: Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent successfully handles the "List rooms" request and presents the result.
